meaning: adj.雾深的,模糊的,朦胧的,(玻璃窗等)不明净的
examples: Get away from the foggy morning.
No area was spared or unaffected, from the foggy northern coast to the Sierra Nevada Mountains.
They can change their minds 200 times, but having only a foggy view of the future is of little good.
Yes, the alchemy is foggy, but the lesson is clear: Bet on John Malone.
Earlier today, reporters gathered in the press room at Foggy Bottom waiting for their daily briefing.
